GetLoggedData
GetLoggedData

Contains logic for the Get Logged Data Node command.

Functions
buildCommand
static ByteStream buildCommand(
WirelessPacket::AsppVersion asppVer,
NodeAddress nodeAddress,
uint32 flashAddress
)

Builds the GetLoggedData command packet.

Parameters
nodeAddress
NodeAddress

the address of the Node to build the command for.

flashAddress
uint32

The flash address to read.

Returns

A ByteStream containing the GetLoggedData command packet.

ResponsePattern
SetToIdle.​Response
Response

Handles the response to the GetLoggedData Node command.

Functions
Response
Response(
NodeAddress nodeAddress,
uint32 flashAddress,
std::weak_ptr<ResponseCollector> collector
)

Creates a GetLoggedData Response object.

Parameters
nodeAddress
NodeAddress

the node address to check for.

flashAddress
uint32

The flash address to match in the response.

collector
std::weak_ptr<ResponseCollector>

The ResponseCollector used to register and unregister the response.

Variables
m_nodeAddress
NodeAddress m_nodeAddress

The node address to look for in the response.

m_flashAddress
uint32 m_flashAddress

The flash address to match in the response.

m_data
ByteStream m_data

The ByteStream containing the resulting data on success.

Functions
matchSuccessResponse
bool matchSuccessResponse(
const WirelessPacket &packet
) override

Checks if the WirelessPacket passed in matches the success response pattern's bytes

Parameters
packet
const WirelessPacket&

The WirelessPacket in which to try to find the pattern

Returns

true if the packet matches the success response pattern, false otherwise

matchFailResponse
bool matchFailResponse(
const WirelessPacket &packet
) override

Checks if the WirelessPacket passed in matches the failure response pattern's bytes

Parameters
packet
const WirelessPacket&

The WirelessPacket in which to try to find the pattern

Returns

true if the packet matches the success response pattern, false otherwise

data
const ByteStream& data() const

Gets the ByteStream containing the data from a successful response.
